raw_transcript: Fecal Microbiota Transplant, or FMT, is actually the most effective treatment for multiple recurrences. It has a nearly 90% success rate because it literally replants a healthy colony of bacteria in your colon. Since you're on your third bout, you are officially a candidate.
final_corrected_note: Fecal Microbiota Transplant, or FMT, is actually the most effective treatment for multiple recurrences. It has a nearly 90% success rate because it literally replants a healthy colony of bacteria in your colon. Since you're on your third bout, you are officially a candidate.
